title: Myriopus selleanus
taxonomy: Myriopus selleanus is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. It is native to North America and is also known by its common name of "thread-leaved globemallow". The classification of this plant includes its order, which is Gentianales. Myriopus selleanus is further classified within the family Scrophulariaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as figworts. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.
